title: CobblemonStarlightFusion
description: This is an add-on for Cobblemon that enables the fusion of two Pokémon, transforming them into entirely new designs. Currently, only Gardevoir and a few Eevee fusion models are available. More models will be added in future updates, so stay tuned!
body:
Embark on a brand-new fusion adventure! In this Cobblemon addon, use the FusionSplicer to absorb Pokemon materials, fuse and evolve your main Pokemon, and unlock cool new forms!

![Sylvevoir](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43af8f08d82286dbdcd5a3e918b15468c3462c40.jpeg)

# List of Fusion Pokémon
